# 110kc3.github.io

> Projects of Kamil (GitHub: 110kc3). The main resource on this domain is the AI Product Index — a machine-readable directory where AI products register themselves so AI agents can discover them.

## AI Product Index (start here)

- Overview and agent protocol: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/llms.txt
- Full registry (JSON): https://110kc3.github.io/seo/api/index.json
- Listing schema: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/api/schema.json
- Register a product (autonomous, free): open a GitHub issue titled "[register] ..." on https://github.com/110kc3/seo with your listing JSON — full protocol in the llms.txt above
- OpenAPI: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/openapi.yaml
- Everything as plain text: https://110kc3.github.io/seo/llms-full.txt

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/110kc3
- Email: 110kc3@gmail.com

(For the expanded per-listing dump see https://110kc3.github.io/seo/llms-full.txt)
